note: Primary data sources this project is built to use. Replace placeholder figures with verified values pulled from these sources.

sources.name: ONS: Public sector finances
sources.covers: Net debt, borrowing, debt interest, monthly public finances. The headline UK measures.

sources.name: OBR: Public finances databank and forecasts
sources.covers: Long-run public finance series and official forecasts to compare outturn against.
sources.updateFrequency: At fiscal events and on release

sources.name: UK Debt Management Office
sources.covers: Gilt issuance, the stock of gilts, and who holds UK government debt.

sources.name: HM Treasury: Public spending statistics
sources.covers: Spending by function (health, education, defence, welfare).

sources.name: ONS: Population estimates
sources.covers: UK population, used for per-person figures.

sources.name: IMF: World Economic Outlook database
sources.covers: Consistent international debt and deficit comparisons.

sources.name: Bank of England: A millennium of macroeconomic data
sources.covers: Long-run historical series for the timeline.
